# hand fixtures

- `*.npy` (gitignored): seeded-random spike I/O from
  `tools/handtrack-oracle/spike_io.py`. Regenerable; not committed.
- `spike_manifest.json` (gitignored): tensor shape/dtype manifest.
- `sample_hand.png` + `landmarks_golden.npy` (later, plan Phase 6.2): the
  real-hand end-to-end golden for the hermetic CI inference test.
